John F. Mounier, Jr., Esq. 916/554-5800 for Plaintiff/Cross-Defendant EDWIN HOUTKOOPER moving for summary adjudication of issues
Allen J. Capeloto, Esq. 650/571-1200 for defendants/Cross-Complainants DICK A. PETERSON and LINDA J. PETERSON opposing party
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - Denied - failure to comply with Rule 342 but the Court will treat as Motion for Adjudication:
Cause of Action 1 - denied - triable issue of fact as to the date of original breach of contract.
Cause of Action 2 for fraud - denied - failure to sustain burden of proof of evidence.
Cause of Action 3 for breach of fiduciary duty - denied.
(JJM/RC) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
